changeLog:
Cover priority: an image explicitly named as cover art (Artwork/Cover/Folder/Front/...) found on the folder chain now wins over the embedded picture. Fixes packs (e.g. SwishSwoosh) that embed a label logo into every file while the real pack cover sits in the root as Artwork.png. Unnamed nearby images still rank below the embedded picture.
----
封面优先级调整:文件夹链上找到明确以 Artwork/Cover/Folder/Front 等命名的封面图时,优先于音频内嵌图显示(修复 SwishSwoosh 等每个文件都内嵌厂牌 logo 而真封面在根目录 Artwork.png 的包);未明确命名的普通图片仍低于内嵌图。
